_comment: Nutrition/livelihoods program. Demonstrates: (1) cascading lookup tables for geographic hierarchy (county->subcounty->ward->CHU->village), (2) savings group registration with auto-generated UUID code, (3) followup form with 14 case preloads for financial tracking across savings cycles, (4) member-level attendance and health messaging tracking, (5) multi-select for session topics received

modules.name: ENROLL SILC GROUP
modules._comment: Registration module: creates savings group case with geographic lookups and auto-generated group code via concat('SILC-', uuid(10))

children.label: Number of Members at the time group was formed

modules.name: SILC DATA COLLECTION
modules._comment: Followup module: preloads 14 financial fields from case, tracks savings cycles, loans outstanding, calculates profit (A-B formula). Two forms: data collection + group detail update.
